name: Lord Cooper
title: Manhunter

abilities.name: Eyes on the Prize
abilities.text: When this model would gain a token, it may discard a card. If it does so, it does not gain the token.

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

abilities.name: Soulstone-Powered Armor
abilities.text: This model may drain a (soulstone) to reduce damage dealt to it by 2.

actions.name: Machete
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a non-Scheme marker within 1" to receive a (c).

triggers.name: Firm Disinvitation
triggers.text: After resolving, move the target up to 3".

actions.name: .950 Nitro Express
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This action may target friendly models.

triggers.name: You Signed the Contract
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting an ally, ignoring this action's once per activation restriction.

triggers.name: Trophy Hunter
triggers.text: After killing, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Target Sighted
actions.effects: Target gains an Distracted token. If this attack receives a raise, the target also gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: The Most Dangerous Game
triggers.text: If the target is cost 7 or more, it must either be dealt 2 damage or this model may move it up to 3".

triggers.name: According to Plan
triggers.text: After resolving, move the target up to 4".

extraction_notes: Elite Equipment and Runaway (3) appear as labels but have no descriptive text visible on this card front
Runaway (3) appears in the bottom-right, may indicate a model limit or related keyword
